school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: The class with Quinn's grade is between the class in Period 1's grade and the Geography class' grade.
Iris goes with exactly two of Carver, Chemistry, 73%, and Period 2.
Jonah does not go with Art if and only if Boyd goes with 79%.
Dunn goes with at least two of English, 73%, and Period 5.
The class in Period 5's grade is higher than both the Biology class' grade and the class with Jonah's grade.
The class with Quinn's grade is at least 3% more than the Art class' grade.
Either Period 2 goes with 73% or 79% goes with Art.
Hale, Chemistry, 75%, and Period 2 belong to different classes.
Period 2, Period 4, and Period 5 go with Hale, Biology, and English, in some order.
Mona goes with exactly one of English, Geography, or Period 4.
Carver goes with Mona.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: The player who loves the Zwischenzug's rating is between the player who placed 5th's rating and the Pirc player's rating.

Gambit does not go with Benoni if and only if Anatoly goes with 2185.

The player who loves the Zwischenzug's rating is at least 200 more than the Benoni player's rating.
Either 4th goes with 1885 or 2185 goes with Benoni.
Vera, Italian, 1985, and 4th belong to different players.
4th, 2nd, and 1st go with Vera, French, and London, in some order.
Skewer goes with exactly one of London, Pirc, or 2nd.
Boris goes with Skewer.
